DataRequest.Name: XSS Attempt script detection in query / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects various patterns pertaining to potencial scripting attacks. These detections are completely based on regex element on the mecanism.

SubPattern.name: XSS_1
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(?i)<script[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)<script[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)<script[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?")

SubPattern.name: XSS_3
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "((%3C)|<)((%2F)|/)*[A-Za-z0-9]+((%3E)|>)" OR uriQuery REGEXP "((%3C)|<)((%2F)|/)*[A-Za-z0-9]+((%3E)|>)" OR httpMethod REGEXP "((%3C)|<)((%2F)|/)*[A-Za-z0-9]+((%3E)|>)")

SubPattern.name: XSS_4
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(?i)(?:<(?:(?:applet|objec)t|isindex|embed|style|form|meta)\\b[^>]*?>[\\s\\S]*?|(?:=|U\\s*?R\\s*?L\\s*?\\()\\s*?[^>]*?\\s*?S\\s*?C\\s*?R\\s*?I\\s*?P\\s*?T\\s*?:)" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)(?:<(?:(?:applet|objec)t|isindex|embed|style|form|meta)\\b[^>]*?>[\\s\\S]*?|(?:=|U\\s*?R\\s*?L\\s*?\\()\\s*?[^>]*?\\s*?S\\s*?C\\s*?R\\s*?I\\s*?P\\s*?T\\s*?:)" OR httpMethod REGEXP "(?i)(?:<(?:(?:applet|objec)t|isindex|embed|style|form|meta)\\b[^>]*?>[\\s\\S]*?|(?:=|U\\s*?R\\s*?L\\s*?\\()\\s*?[^>]*?\\s*?S\\s*?C\\s*?R\\s*?I\\s*?P\\s*?T\\s*?:)")
